summary: W853 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while removing an unused category-homology payload from the remaining selected-cochain provider. It defines a homology-free one-provider surface containing the exact W735 branch data W851 consumes after W831 supplies the comparison route, case-splits the closed-map or closed-embedding closedness branch, rebuilds the matching W735 exact-input branch internally, and applies the W851 comparison-selected-cochain stable route. The final original four-task witness is still absent because no concrete homology-free selected-cochain route-data provider and no completion review packet have been constructed.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W853 reaches the selected-cochain stable package from one homology-free provider, but that provider is still an input rather than a constructed value.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing because the concrete homology-free selected-cochain route-data provider has not been constructed.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still record nonterminal evidence and lack originalFourTaskContractCompletion.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit in the completion packet shape required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct a concrete homology-free selected-cochain route-data provider, including boundary data, relation data, target closedness data, normalized fixed-target data, source triangulation data, endpoint strict-topology data, and localized-right-adjoint data.
Expose a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness using the W853 route after the provider is real.
Refresh the review packet fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
